church_profile.name: KaNeXT Community Church
church_profile.description: A vibrant, welcoming community of faith dedicated to worship, growth, and service
church_profile.vision: To build a thriving community of believers who impact the world through faith, love, and service

leadership.name: Pastor James Carter
leadership.title: Lead Pastor
leadership.bio: Pastor James Carter is the founding lead pastor of KaNeXT Community Church. With over 20 years of ministry experience, he has a passion for building authentic community and developing servant leaders.

leadership.name: Pastor Grace Carter
leadership.title: Executive Pastor
leadership.bio: Pastor Grace Carter serves as the executive pastor of KaNeXT Community Church. She oversees ministry operations, women's ministry, and community outreach programs.

ministries.name: Men's Fellowship
ministries.description: A ministry for men to grow in faith, leadership, and accountability.

ministries.name: Women's Fellowship
ministries.description: A community for women to connect, grow, and serve together.

ministries.name: Next Gen
ministries.description: Young adults ministry for ages 18-30. Contemporary worship, life groups, and community events.

ministries.name: KaNeXT Kids
ministries.description: Children's ministry with engaging, age-appropriate Bible lessons, worship, and activities. Nursery available for infants and toddlers.

ministries.name: Ignite Youth
ministries.description: Teen ministry with weekly gatherings, retreats, and service projects for students in grades 6-12.

ministries.name: Life Groups
ministries.description: Small group gatherings in homes and on campus for Bible study, prayer, and authentic community. Open to everyone.

ministries.name: Connect Groups
ministries.description: Interest-based groups that meet regularly for fellowship, discussion, and shared activities. A great way to meet new people.

ministries.name: Worship Team
ministries.description: Music and worship ministry including vocalists, instrumentalists, and production team. Serves in weekly services and special events.

ministries.name: Single & Purposeful
ministries.description: A ministry for single adults to grow spiritually, build meaningful relationships, and serve the community.

ministries.name: Community Outreach
ministries.description: Serving the local community through food drives, mentoring programs, and partnership with local organizations.

giving.philosophy: We believe in the joy of generosity. Every gift supports our mission to build community, serve others, and share hope.

methods.label: KaNeXT App
methods.instructions: Give through the KaNeXT app under Church > Giving

events.title: 21 Days of Prayer & Fasting
events.description: Annual prayer and fasting initiative to start the new year. Led by Pastor Grace Carter.

events.title: Night of Worship
events.description: An evening of extended worship and prayer.

events.title: Community Impact Day
events.description: Churchwide service day partnering with local organizations to serve our neighbors.

morningPrayer.name: Morning Prayer Line
morningPrayer.description: Daily morning prayer ministry open to all. A time to start the day in prayer and worship together.
morningPrayer.access: Join via the KaNeXT Church app or call the prayer line
